short_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, Caught by de Kock!! Fine catch by de Kock to his right. Fullish outside off, Milton Shumba prem
full_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, Caught by de Kock!! Fine catch by de Kock to his right. Fullish outside off, Milton Shumba premeditates the paddle but gloves it and it's going to the right of de Kock who dives and comes up with a two-handed catch. So the extra ball produces Nortje a wicket.

short_text: Nortje to Madhevere, byes, 1 run, such a pacey delivery this. Dug in short on the stumps, Madhevere pulls and misses, th
full_text: Nortje to Madhevere, byes, 1 run, such a pacey delivery this. Dug in short on the stumps, Madhevere pulls and misses, they run a bye as de Kock opts not to throw

short_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, leg byes, 1 run, short on the stumps, Milton Shumba pulls but is beaten for pace, does well to
full_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, leg byes, 1 run, short on the stumps, Milton Shumba pulls but is beaten for pace, does well to get something on that as it lobs in front of third man

short_text: Nortje to Shumba, 1 run, 5 runs, full just outside off, Milton Shumba reverse-scoops and the ball goes off the back of t
full_text: Nortje to Shumba, 1 run, 5 runs, full just outside off, Milton Shumba reverse-scoops and the ball goes off the back of the bat to fine-leg. And what do we have here: as Ngidi's throw falls on the glove lying on the ground. So that's bonus for Zimbabwe. The throw was on the bounce to de Kock who had one glove off,

short_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, 1 run, back of a length on the stumps, Madhevere swings and the top-edge falls in front of thir
full_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, 1 run, back of a length on the stumps, Madhevere swings and the top-edge falls in front of third man

short_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, 2 runs, full on the stumps, heaved to deep mid-wicket and Milton Shumba takes on Miller and div
full_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, 2 runs, full on the stumps, heaved to deep mid-wicket and Milton Shumba takes on Miller and dives back for the second

short_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, leg byes, , . This is clearly striking Milton Shumba well outside leg. Waste of a review. Not t
full_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, leg byes, , . This is clearly striking Milton Shumba well outside leg. Waste of a review. Not too sure if Shumba played a shot at that, beaten for pace he was as the yorker thudded into the left boot and the bat came down as an afterthought on the flick, runs away to the fine-leg fence. Nortje was smiling because he was not sure that Shumba had played a shot, given as legbyes though

short_text: Rabada to Madhevere, , this is a big over. Zimbabwe needed that. This slower off-cutter outside off sits up short and Ma
full_text: Rabada to Madhevere, , this is a big over. Zimbabwe needed that. This slower off-cutter outside off sits up short and Madhevere reaches out to cut over backward point, runs away to the fence

short_text: Rabada to Madhevere, , just over the leaping de Kock. Just and four. The slower off-cutter dug in, rises over his head a
full_text: Rabada to Madhevere, , just over the leaping de Kock. Just and four. The slower off-cutter dug in, rises over his head and Madhevere ramps it over the full-length leap of de Kock. Beats the dive of fine-leg as well

short_text: Rabada to Madhevere, 2 runs, outstanding from Rossouw at deep square leg, goes to his left and dives, stops it with his
full_text: Rabada to Madhevere, 2 runs, outstanding from Rossouw at deep square leg, goes to his left and dives, stops it with his left hand. This is dug in short on the stumps, Madhevere pulls hard again

short_text: Rabada to Madhevere, , what a cracking blow. Dug in on a back of a length outside off, he hammers the pull and clears de
full_text: Rabada to Madhevere, , what a cracking blow. Dug in on a back of a length outside off, he hammers the pull and clears deep mid-wicket. Went on his back foot and gave it his all

short_text: Rabada to Milton Shumba, 1 run, slower off-cutter dug in outside leg as Milton Shumba made room, pulled without any timi
full_text: Rabada to Milton Shumba, 1 run, slower off-cutter dug in outside leg as Milton Shumba made room, pulled without any timing to deep square leg

short_text: Rabada to Milton Shumba, no run, full and angling across Milton Shumba who tries the reverse-lap and misses. Flies over
full_text: Rabada to Milton Shumba, no run, full and angling across Milton Shumba who tries the reverse-lap and misses. Flies over the top-edge

short_text: Nortje to Madhevere, 2 runs, back of a length outside off, Madhevere mows it over mid-off, not well-timed but over the h
full_text: Nortje to Madhevere, 2 runs, back of a length outside off, Madhevere mows it over mid-off, not well-timed but over the head of the fielder for a couple

short_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, 1 run, short on the stumps, Milton Shumba pulls to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, 1 run, short on the stumps, Milton Shumba pulls to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Nortje to Madhevere, 1 run, fullish just outside off, Madhevere throws the bat and the thick inside-edge runs away wide
full_text: Nortje to Madhevere, 1 run, fullish just outside off, Madhevere throws the bat and the thick inside-edge runs away wide of the stumps, to fine-leg

short_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, 1 run, premeditated and Milton Shumba gets bat on that scoop, gets outside off and plays it dow
full_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, 1 run, premeditated and Milton Shumba gets bat on that scoop, gets outside off and plays it down to fine-leg

short_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, no run, full on the stumps, Milton Shumba drills it straight to the fielder at mid-on
full_text: Nortje to Milton Shumba, no run, full on the stumps, Milton Shumba drills it straight to the fielder at mid-on

short_text: Nortje to Madhevere, 1 run, wide length ball outside off, Madhevere reaches out and toe-ends the cut to third man
full_text: Nortje to Madhevere, 1 run, wide length ball outside off, Madhevere reaches out and toe-ends the cut to third man

short_text: Maharaj to Milton Shumba, 2 runs, dragged down and Milton Shumba punches off the back foot to long-on and runs back for
full_text: Maharaj to Milton Shumba, 2 runs, dragged down and Milton Shumba punches off the back foot to long-on and runs back for a quick two

short_text: Maharaj to Madhevere, 1 run, full on the stumps, Madhevere makes room and crashes it to long-off
full_text: Maharaj to Madhevere, 1 run, full on the stumps, Madhevere makes room and crashes it to long-off

short_text: Maharaj to Madhevere, 2 runs, floated up outside off, Madhevere shuffles across and top-edges the slogsweep, Ngidi just
full_text: Maharaj to Madhevere, 2 runs, floated up outside off, Madhevere shuffles across and top-edges the slogsweep, Ngidi just outside the circle at backward square leg,

short_text: Maharaj to Milton Shumba, 1 run, tossed up outside off, Milton Shumba sweeps to deep square leg
full_text: Maharaj to Milton Shumba, 1 run, tossed up outside off, Milton Shumba sweeps to deep square leg

short_text: Maharaj to Milton Shumba, , dragged down outside off and Milton Shumba pulls hard and to the left of Stubbs at deep mid-
full_text: Maharaj to Milton Shumba, , dragged down outside off and Milton Shumba pulls hard and to the left of Stubbs at deep mid-wicket, as he goes down, allows the ball to go through his hands. Stubbs would be disappointed for he is a fine fielder

short_text: Maharaj to Milton Shumba, no run, tossed up outside off, Milton Shumba tries the reverse-sweep and misses
full_text: Maharaj to Milton Shumba, no run, tossed up outside off, Milton Shumba tries the reverse-sweep and misses

short_text: Ngidi to Milton Shumba, 1 run, full outside off, pushed in front of cover for an easy single
full_text: Ngidi to Milton Shumba, 1 run, full outside off, pushed in front of cover for an easy single

short_text: Ngidi to Milton Shumba, no run, Milton Shumba again shimmies down the track and gets an inside-edge on the flick, on to
full_text: Ngidi to Milton Shumba, no run, Milton Shumba again shimmies down the track and gets an inside-edge on the flick, on to the pad, wants a run to the right of Ngidi but is sent back

short_text: Ngidi to Milton Shumba, , dug in short outside off, but too short and a wide called
full_text: Ngidi to Milton Shumba, , dug in short outside off, but too short and a wide called

short_text: Ngidi to Milton Shumba, no run, superb comeback from Ngidi, angled in on the fourth-stump line, just past the outside-ed
full_text: Ngidi to Milton Shumba, no run, superb comeback from Ngidi, angled in on the fourth-stump line, just past the outside-edge as Milton Shumba pushes and very close to off-stump too

short_text: Ngidi to Milton Shumba, , Milton Shumba comes down the track and swings at that one outside off, the thick outside-edge
full_text: Ngidi to Milton Shumba, , Milton Shumba comes down the track and swings at that one outside off, the thick outside-edge flies away wide of third man

short_text: Ngidi to Madhevere, 1 run, terrific stop by Markram to his left at backward point as he dives and forces Madhevere to sc
full_text: Ngidi to Madhevere, 1 run, terrific stop by Markram to his left at backward point as he dives and forces Madhevere to scurry to the other end, Madhevere was in even if it did hit direct

short_text: Ngidi to Madhevere, , dug in short and down leg, Madhevere pulls and misses. Called a wide
full_text: Ngidi to Madhevere, , dug in short and down leg, Madhevere pulls and misses. Called a wide

short_text: Ngidi to Madhevere, , beautiful shot. Full outside off, Madhevere gets forward and drives on the rise, splits cover and
full_text: Ngidi to Madhevere, , beautiful shot. Full outside off, Madhevere gets forward and drives on the rise, splits cover and mid-off. So elegant and graceful as well

short_text: Parnell to Milton Shumba, no run, short and angling away from Milton Shumba who looks at a pull and then decides to bail
full_text: Parnell to Milton Shumba, no run, short and angling away from Milton Shumba who looks at a pull and then decides to bail out

short_text: Parnell to Milton Shumba, no run, good length on off, Milton Shumba gets forward to defend
full_text: Parnell to Milton Shumba, no run, good length on off, Milton Shumba gets forward to defend

short_text: Parnell to Madhevere, Williams Run Out!! What a poor bit of running between Madhevere and Williams. It was driven straig
full_text: Parnell to Madhevere, Williams Run Out!! What a poor bit of running between Madhevere and Williams. It was driven straight to the fielder at cover and if that was not enough of a mistake calling for the quick single, the duo collide and make it worse. Miller takes aim and hits direct. Even without a collision, Williams would've been well out. It was a bad call from Madhevere.

short_text: Parnell to Madhevere, no run, back of a length outside off, Madhevere mistimes the cut to backward point
full_text: Parnell to Madhevere, no run, back of a length outside off, Madhevere mistimes the cut to backward point

short_text: Parnell to Madhevere, , short outside off, Madhevere gets the pull low on the bat but it's over mid-wicket and runs away
full_text: Parnell to Madhevere, , short outside off, Madhevere gets the pull low on the bat but it's over mid-wicket and runs away wide of deep square leg for four

short_text: Parnell to Williams, 1 run, back of a length outside off, Williams cuts to Maharaj at backward point who lets it go and
full_text: Parnell to Williams, 1 run, back of a length outside off, Williams cuts to Maharaj at backward point who lets it go and gives the single

short_text: Ngidi to Madhevere, 2 runs, short of length but angling into the body of Madhevere who pulls to deep backward square leg
full_text: Ngidi to Madhevere, 2 runs, short of length but angling into the body of Madhevere who pulls to deep backward square leg for two

short_text: Ngidi to Madhevere, no run, back of a length outside off, Madhevere punches to backward point who goes to his left to di
full_text: Ngidi to Madhevere, no run, back of a length outside off, Madhevere punches to backward point who goes to his left to dive and stop

short_text: Ngidi to Raza, Caught by de Kock!! The talisman for Zimbabwe goes for a second-ball duck. Ngidi has two and South Africa
full_text: Ngidi to Raza, Caught by de Kock!! The talisman for Zimbabwe goes for a second-ball duck. Ngidi has two and South Africa well on top. What a superb leaping one-handed take by de Kock. Dug in short on the stumps, Raza pulls and the feather of a top-edge is held outstandingly by de Kock who made it look easy. That's a body blow for Zimbabwe.

short_text: Ngidi to Raza, no run, short of length on off, Raza rises on his toes and punches to backward point
full_text: Ngidi to Raza, no run, short of length on off, Raza rises on his toes and punches to backward point

short_text: Ngidi to Chakabva, Caught by de Kock!! Ngidi gets immediate revenge. A short of length delivery outside off, Chakabva cu
full_text: Ngidi to Chakabva, Caught by de Kock!! Ngidi gets immediate revenge. A short of length delivery outside off, Chakabva cuts but feathers an edge behind. He was leaning back and did not get on top of the bounce.

short_text: Ngidi to Chakabva, , that's a massive hit into the grassbanks at deep mid-wicket. Full and in the slot outside off, Chak
full_text: Ngidi to Chakabva, , that's a massive hit into the grassbanks at deep mid-wicket. Full and in the slot outside off, Chakabva with a mighty swing of the bat sends the ball soaring away

short_text: Parnell to Ervine, Caught by Ngidi!! Scratchy innings from Ervine ends. He backs away to loft this full delivery on the
full_text: Parnell to Ervine, Caught by Ngidi!! Scratchy innings from Ervine ends. He backs away to loft this full delivery on the stumps, gets it low on the bat and Ngidi runs back from mid-on and takes a safe catch. Ervine walks back looking at the toe of his bat.

short_text: Parnell to Chakabva, leg byes, 1 run, good length sliding down, swung away to fine-leg
full_text: Parnell to Chakabva, leg byes, 1 run, good length sliding down, swung away to fine-leg

short_text: Parnell to Chakabva, no run, He was pretty sure he had not nicked that as he shuffled across to paddle, misses, and the
full_text: Parnell to Chakabva, no run, He was pretty sure he had not nicked that as he shuffled across to paddle, misses, and the ball strikes him high on the thigh after pitching in line, going over and umpire Ahsan Raza's original decision has to be overturned

short_text: Parnell to Chakabva, no run, wild mow across the line and Chakabva misses. Fullish outside off, Chakabva loses all his s
full_text: Parnell to Chakabva, no run, wild mow across the line and Chakabva misses. Fullish outside off, Chakabva loses all his shape as he swings

short_text: Parnell to Ervine, 1 run, Ervine is moving around in his crease every ball, this is a short of length delivery outside o
full_text: Parnell to Ervine, 1 run, Ervine is moving around in his crease every ball, this is a short of length delivery outside off, he shuffles across and top-edges the lap on to his helmet grille I think, takes a single as it rolls in front of the keeper and slips

short_text: Parnell to Ervine, no run, Ervine comes down the track and makes room to loft over extra-cover, but gets nowhere close t
full_text: Parnell to Ervine, no run, Ervine comes down the track and makes room to loft over extra-cover, but gets nowhere close to it as he swings and misses, flies wide of off-stump

short_text: Rabada to Chakabva, no run, Chakabva backs away to crash that through the off-side, but toe-ends it in front of Rabada,
full_text: Rabada to Chakabva, no run, Chakabva backs away to crash that through the off-side, but toe-ends it in front of Rabada, Ervine wants a run, stops, Chakabva responds, then sees Ervine stopping, he stops, Ervine goes back and Rabada does not know which end to throw, in the end he goes for Ervine's end, but the throw is wide

short_text: Rabada to Ervine, leg byes, 1 run, Ervine gets across outside off and tries to heave that to leg, misses and it rolls of
full_text: Rabada to Ervine, leg byes, 1 run, Ervine gets across outside off and tries to heave that to leg, misses and it rolls off his body for a legbye

short_text: Rabada to Chakabva, 1 run, awkwardly played by Chakabva and he gets away with it. This is a short of length delivery on
full_text: Rabada to Chakabva, 1 run, awkwardly played by Chakabva and he gets away with it. This is a short of length delivery on off, Chakabva was almost half-ducking there, then the ball flies off the thick leading-edge and lands well in front of third man

short_text: Rabada to Ervine, 1 run, good stop that by Parnell at short fine-leg. Dives to his left and saves more runs. Ervine had
full_text: Rabada to Ervine, 1 run, good stop that by Parnell at short fine-leg. Dives to his left and saves more runs. Ervine had got across and swung that pretty well

short_text: Rabada to Ervine, no run, that's nipped back in from a short of length and cut Ervine in half. Flies over middle-stump a
full_text: Rabada to Ervine, no run, that's nipped back in from a short of length and cut Ervine in half. Flies over middle-stump after beating the inside-edge

short_text: Rabada to Chakabva, 1 run, short and wide outside off, Chakabva crashes it wide of cover but Bavuma gets across and cuts
full_text: Rabada to Chakabva, 1 run, short and wide outside off, Chakabva crashes it wide of cover but Bavuma gets across and cuts it off with a dive from mid-off

short_text: Raza to de Kock, 3 runs, fired outside off and de Kock has to reach for it, he slices it with an open face over the back
full_text: Raza to de Kock, 3 runs, fired outside off and de Kock has to reach for it, he slices it with an open face over the backward point region and Bavuma races back for the third.

short_text: Raza to de Kock, , 2 runs, fraction short and around off, de Kock makes room and cuts it square on the off-side, easy br
full_text: Raza to de Kock, , 2 runs, fraction short and around off, de Kock makes room and cuts it square on the off-side, easy brace. The third umpire has spotted Raza overstepping and makes a late call

short_text: Raza to de Kock, no run, This was so close that de Kock was almost walking back when he saw the first replay but was ask
full_text: Raza to de Kock, no run, This was so close that de Kock was almost walking back when he saw the first replay but was asked to wait by his skipper. The slider which drifts in with the angle, de Kock sits down and misses the slog sweep, struck in front of the stumps and ball-tracking showed it to be kissing the leg-stump

short_text: Raza to Bavuma, 1 run, fired down leg, Bavuma premeditates the reverse sweep and jams it into the off-side
full_text: Raza to Bavuma, 1 run, fired down leg, Bavuma premeditates the reverse sweep and jams it into the off-side

short_text: Raza to de Kock, 1 run, short and bowled into the wicket, de Kock nails the pull straight to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Raza to de Kock, 1 run, short and bowled into the wicket, de Kock nails the pull straight to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Raza to de Kock, 2 runs, fraction short and de Kock swats the pull in front of square through the vacant mid-wicket pock
full_text: Raza to de Kock, 2 runs, fraction short and de Kock swats the pull in front of square through the vacant mid-wicket pocket, just a brace

short_text: Raza to Bavuma, 1 run, flatter and cramping Bavuma for room, he gloves the reverse sweep in front of point and gets de K
full_text: Raza to Bavuma, 1 run, flatter and cramping Bavuma for room, he gloves the reverse sweep in front of point and gets de Kock back on strike

short_text: Ngarava to de Kock, , this is terrific hitting. de Kock makes room and slashes the short of length delivery backward of
full_text: Ngarava to de Kock, , this is terrific hitting. de Kock makes room and slashes the short of length delivery backward of point. Ngarava is down on the ground and is clutching his left thigh. Hamstring injury?

short_text: Ngarava to de Kock, no run, no width on offer and right at the stumps, de Kock defends it down the pitch
full_text: Ngarava to de Kock, no run, no width on offer and right at the stumps, de Kock defends it down the pitch

short_text: Ngarava to de Kock, , it is boundary or nothing for de Kock. Ngarava overcooks the full delivery outside off and de Kock
full_text: Ngarava to de Kock, , it is boundary or nothing for de Kock. Ngarava overcooks the full delivery outside off and de Kock drills the drive through the off-side. Not a muscle move as the ball raced away

short_text: Ngarava to de Kock, , Madhevere puts in a desperate dive but it is not good enough to stop the boundary. Short of length
full_text: Ngarava to de Kock, , Madhevere puts in a desperate dive but it is not good enough to stop the boundary. Short of length and de Kock swivels to pull it behind square on the leg-side, Madhevere moves to his left from deep square leg and gets there, but the ball bounces of his body and rolls into the rope

short_text: Ngarava to de Kock, , de Kock wants to get this done with. Full delivery outside off and he pumps it over extra cover, c
full_text: Ngarava to de Kock, , de Kock wants to get this done with. Full delivery outside off and he pumps it over extra cover, couple of bounces and over the rope

short_text: Ngarava to de Kock, no run, short of length outside off, de Kock throws everything behind the cross-batted shot and does
full_text: Ngarava to de Kock, no run, short of length outside off, de Kock throws everything behind the cross-batted shot and does not connect

short_text: Ngarava to de Kock, , I0$ back of a length and de Kock is opened up, defends to mid-wicket. But Ngarava has overstepped
full_text: Ngarava to de Kock, , I0$ back of a length and de Kock is opened up, defends to mid-wicket. But Ngarava has overstepped

short_text: Chatara to de Kock, 1 run, off-cutter dug in outside leg, de Kock pulls but gloves it to the backward square leg region
full_text: Chatara to de Kock, 1 run, off-cutter dug in outside leg, de Kock pulls but gloves it to the backward square leg region for one. 23 off the over and Zimbabwe are feeling the effect of de Kock's hitting

short_text: Chatara to de Kock, , back of a length on the stumps, de Kock pulls hard and beats deep mid-wicket to his right. What a
full_text: Chatara to de Kock, , back of a length on the stumps, de Kock pulls hard and beats deep mid-wicket to his right. What a start this is for South Africa and de Kock. 25% of the target wiped off in 5 balls

short_text: Chatara to de Kock, , swinging into the pads and de Kock has got forward and heaved that over mid-wicket. All the way an
full_text: Chatara to de Kock, , swinging into the pads and de Kock has got forward and heaved that over mid-wicket. All the way and 18 off the over already. It swung nicely into his swinging arc and he did not miss

short_text: Chatara to de Kock, , make that a hat-trick of boundaries. That's lucky for de Kock. He swings at a fullish delivery on
full_text: Chatara to de Kock, , make that a hat-trick of boundaries. That's lucky for de Kock. He swings at a fullish delivery on the stumps and the fat top-edge goes straight up, but almost all the way, just lands in front of the boundary cushions at fine-leg. And Muzarabani was in at short fine anyway

short_text: Chatara to de Kock, , can't bowl short at his pace. de Kock muscles the pull wide of deep square leg and he is off to a
full_text: Chatara to de Kock, , can't bowl short at his pace. de Kock muscles the pull wide of deep square leg and he is off to a rapid start. Poor start from Chatara

short_text: Chatara to de Kock, , South Africa are away. Leg-lined and going down, de Kock swings it over the leaping short fine-leg
full_text: Chatara to de Kock, , South Africa are away. Leg-lined and going down, de Kock swings it over the leaping short fine-leg fielder
